description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a black exterior and bold, stylized 'ARCADE' lettering on both side panels, set against a radiating blue and black background. The front panel includes a slightly recessed display screen, flanked by a control panel with multiple buttons and joysticks, suitable for one or two players. The control panel is equipped with colored buttons and a joystick on each side, with a coin slot and return mechanism located below. The top of the cabinet displays a marquee area with the word 'ARCADE' in a retro font, illuminated by a burst pattern. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and coin mechanism. The overall appearance is robust and visually striking, designed to attract attention in public or recreational urban spaces.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with bold 'ARCADE' graphics, a control panel with joysticks and buttons, and a prominent marquee. The cabinet is mostly black with blue and red accents and features a coin slot below the controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel with buttons and joysticks, coin slot, and the illuminated marquee at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large 'ARCADE' text and radiating blue-black background graphic on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid black back panel with no visible features or graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same 'ARCADE' text and radiating background graphic.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple colored buttons arranged for two players side-by-side, with clear separation and a central coin slot below.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'ARCADE' in bold, stylized font with a radiating blue and black background, matching the side panel theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large 'ARCADE' text in red with a radiating blue and black background pattern; no additional imagery or decals.
